message.content:
I can configure the LLM, but I need the max_tokens value (the maximum number of tokens in responses).

Options:
- 512 (short responses)
- 1024 (default)
- 2048 (longer responses)

Would you like me to set max_tokens to 1024 now, or provide a different value? If you’re unsure, I can start with 1024 and adjust later.
